text.title: error-handling Examples
text.summary: Three framework-specific reference implementations of the ProblemDetail handler.

example.note: 5xx detail is static — no exc.__str__. traceId propagated from W3C header.
One middleware handles everything. 5xx body is static.
Spring 6 provides ProblemDetail natively. APPLICATION_PROBLEM_JSON enforces +json content-type.

example.code:
import jsonschema, requests, yaml, pathlib
SCHEMA = yaml.safe_load(pathlib.Path("templates/problem-details.schema.yaml").read_text())
def test_validation_error_envelope(): r = requests.post("http://localhost:8000/users", json={}) assert r.headers["content-type"].startswith("application/problem+json") assert r.status_code == 400 body = r.json() jsonschema.validate(body, SCHEMA) assert body["status"] == r.status_code
example.note: Reusable across endpoints. Asserts content-type, status range, schema, and status-match.
